---
title: "data"
output: html_document
---

The 'Exposure' tool allows users to view the distribution of the species within BCR 6 and access the exposure metrics at the OSR-level and at the level of the individual lease. 

##### Lease holder and area of interest (AOI) selection
Use the left hand side of the 'Exposure' tool to select the species for assessment.

- **Step 1.** Select the lease holder from the dropdown list. 

- **Step 2.** Select the AOI from the checklist (The Production Fields can be viewed on the initial map). 

- **Step 3.** Use the interactive map to view the species distribution and select lease areas to veiw exposure metrics.
